demo_questions.prompt: Show me salinity profiles near the equator in March 2023.

cards.title: Floats within 100 km of (0°N, 0°E) : Globe View
Quick Summary
cards.text: Found 6 profiles from 3 floats. Near-surface salinity ranges 34.8 to 35.2 PSU. See QC notes.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT * FROM profiles WHERE ABS(latitude) < 5 AND ABS(longitude) < 5 AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date) = 3 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = 2023 AND parameter = 'salinity';

demo_questions.prompt: Compare BGC parameters in the Arabian Sea for the last 6 months.
demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT * FROM bgc_profiles WHERE region = 'Arabian Sea' AND date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 6 MONTH);

demo_questions.prompt: What are the nearest ARGO floats to 15.5°N, 70.2°E?

cards.title: Nearest Float List
cards.text: Top 5 nearest floats: WMO_5901234 (12 km), WMO_5905678 (24 km)...

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT *, SQRT(POW(latitude-15.5,2)+POW(longitude-70.2,2)) AS distance FROM floats ORDER BY distance ASC LIMIT 5;

demo_questions.prompt: Show temperature profiles for float WMO_5901234 for its last 3 cycles.

cards.title: Profile Metadata
cards.text: Cycles: 182 to 184. Deployment date: 2021-06-10. QC: majority good.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT * FROM profiles WHERE float_id = 'WMO_5901234' AND cycle BETWEEN 182 AND 184 AND parameter = 'temperature';

demo_questions.prompt: Show time-depth heatmap of oxygen at 10°S, 80°E over the last year.
demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT * FROM profiles WHERE latitude = -10 AND longitude = 80 AND parameter = 'oxygen' AND date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 1 YEAR);

demo_questions.prompt: Compare salinity correlation with temperature for profiles in the southern Indian Ocean.

cards.title: Statistical Summary
cards.text: Pearson r = -0.18 (p < 0.01). Weak negative correlation at depth > 200m.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT salinity, temperature FROM profiles WHERE region = 'Southern Indian Ocean' AND depth > 200;

demo_questions.prompt: List all BGC floats that reported chlorophyll above 1.5 mg/m³ in July 2024.
demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT * FROM bgc_profiles WHERE parameter = 'chlorophyll' AND value > 1.5 AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date) = 7 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = 2024;

demo_questions.prompt: Show me the deployment history and trajectory for float WMO_5902345.

cards.title: Deployment Details
cards.text: Deployed: 2020-04-12 at 12.3N, 62.1E. Status: Active. Last contact: 2025-08-21.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT * FROM deployments WHERE float_id = 'WMO_5902345'; SELECT * FROM trajectories WHERE float_id = 'WMO_5902345';

demo_questions.prompt: Give me the raw CSV snippet for profile_id P_5901234_184.

cards.title: File
cards.text: Original NetCDF: WMO_5901234_cycle184.nc

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT * FROM profiles WHERE profile_id = 'P_5901234_184';

demo_questions.prompt: Summarize the QC status for all profiles from float WMO_5905678 in 2024.

cards.title: QC Overview — WMO_5905678 (2024)
cards.text: Total profiles: 12. QC pass: 10, flagged: 2 (pressure anomalies). See detailed QC table.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT * FROM qc_reports WHERE float_id = 'WMO_5905678' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = 2024;

demo_questions.prompt: Show mixed layer depth variations in the Bay of Bengal during monsoon 2023.

cards.title: Mixed Layer Depth vs Time — Bay of Bengal (Jun–Sep 2023)
Quick Summary
cards.text: MLD ranged 20–60 m with strong deepening events linked to wind-driven mixing during July–August.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT * FROM profiles WHERE region = 'Bay of Bengal' AND parameter = 'mixed_layer_depth' AND date BETWEEN '2023-06-01' AND '2023-09-30';

followUpQuestions.prompt: Compare mixed layer depth anomalies in Bay of Bengal with wind speed anomalies during monsoon 2023.

demo_questions.prompt: Compare seasonal averages of temperature in the Southern Ocean at 200 m depth.
demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT season, AVG(temperature) AS avg_temp FROM profiles WHERE region = 'Southern Ocean' AND depth = 200 GROUP BY season;

followUpQuestions.prompt: Show long-term trend of temperature at 200 m in the Southern Ocean over the past 20 years.

demo_questions.prompt: List floats reporting pH below 7.9 in the Pacific Ocean in 2024.
demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT * FROM bgc_profiles WHERE region = 'Pacific Ocean' AND parameter = 'pH' AND value < 7.9 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = 2024;

followUpQuestions.prompt: Map areas where pH < 7.9 coincides with high chlorophyll in the Pacific Ocean (2024).

demo_questions.prompt: Show trajectory paths of floats deployed in the Mediterranean Sea in 2022.

cards.title: Deployment Overview
cards.text: 7 floats deployed, covering eastern and central basins with active reporting until 2025.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT * FROM trajectories WHERE region = 'Mediterranean Sea' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM deployment_date) = 2022;

followUpQuestions.prompt: Show speed and drift rates of Mediterranean floats deployed in 2022.

demo_questions.prompt: Generate a heatmap of nitrate concentration in the North Atlantic during spring 2024.
demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT * FROM bgc_profiles WHERE parameter = 'nitrate' AND region = 'North Atlantic' AND date BETWEEN '2024-03-01' AND '2024-05-31';

followUpQuestions.prompt: Compare nitrate concentration in North Atlantic spring 2024 with oxygen concentration at the same locations.

demo_questions.prompt: Compare salinity near the equator between March 2022 and March 2023.

cards.title: Change Summary
cards.text: Slight freshening observed near 5°W in 2023 relative to 2022.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT * FROM profiles WHERE ABS(latitude)<5 AND ABS(longitude)<5 AND parameter='salinity' AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date)=3 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) IN (2022,2023);

demo_questions.prompt: Show anomalies of oxygen and chlorophyll in the Arabian Sea compared to 5-year averages.

cards.title: Quick Insight
cards.text: Above-average chlorophyll during summer upwelling. Oxygen shows localized deficits.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT parameter, value, date FROM bgc_profiles WHERE region='Arabian Sea' AND date>=DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 6 MONTH);

demo_questions.prompt: Show trajectories of the 5 nearest floats over the past year.
demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT * FROM trajectories WHERE float_id IN (SELECT float_id FROM floats ORDER BY SQRT(POW(latitude-15.5,2)+POW(longitude-70.2,2)) ASC LIMIT 5);

demo_questions.prompt: Compare salinity and temperature profiles for the same 3 cycles.

cards.title: Cross-Parameter Insight
cards.text: Salinity inversions align with thermocline features.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT * FROM profiles WHERE float_id='WMO_5901234' AND cycle BETWEEN 182 AND 184 AND parameter IN ('temperature','salinity');

demo_questions.prompt: Show correlation between oxygen and temperature at (10S,80E) over last year.

cards.title: Summary
cards.text: Oxygen minima coincide with thermocline shoaling during summer months.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT oxygen, temperature, depth, date FROM profiles WHERE latitude=-10 AND longitude=80 AND date>=DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 1 YEAR);

demo_questions.prompt: Plot correlation by season to see variability in salinity–temperature relationship.

cards.title: Result
cards.text: Correlation stronger in winter (r=-0.28) than summer (r=-0.12).

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT salinity, temperature, season FROM profiles WHERE region='Southern Indian Ocean' AND depth>200;

demo_questions.prompt: Compare chlorophyll levels of these floats with concurrent oxygen values.

cards.title: Result
cards.text: Elevated chlorophyll associated with low-oxygen layers, suggesting bloom-driven oxygen demand.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT chlorophyll, oxygen, float_id FROM bgc_profiles WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date)=7 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date)=2024 AND parameter IN ('chlorophyll','oxygen');

demo_questions.prompt: Show depth cycling pattern of WMO_5902345 during its deployment.

cards.title: Observation
cards.text: Cycle depths consistent at 2000 m, with occasional shallow cycles for calibration.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT cycle, MAX(depth) FROM profiles WHERE float_id='WMO_5902345' GROUP BY cycle;

demo_questions.prompt: Show quality control flags for profile P_5901234_184.
demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT parameter, qc_flag FROM qc_reports WHERE profile_id='P_5901234_184';

demo_questions.prompt: Show comparison of QC status across all years since deployment for WMO_5905678.

cards.title: QC Trend
cards.text: QC performance stable with occasional pressure sensor issues in 2024.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT YEAR(date) AS year, COUNT(*) AS profiles, SUM(CASE WHEN qc_pass=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pass FROM qc_reports WHERE float_id='WMO_5905678' GROUP BY year;

demo_questions.prompt: Compare mixed layer depth anomalies in Bay of Bengal with wind speed anomalies during monsoon 2023.

cards.title: MLD vs Wind Speed — Bay of Bengal (Monsoon 2023)
Correlation Summary
cards.text: Correlation coefficient r = 0.62. Strong link between deepening MLD and wind events.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT mld, wind_speed, date FROM profiles JOIN winds USING(date, region) WHERE region = 'Bay of Bengal' AND date BETWEEN '2023-06-01' AND '2023-09-30';

demo_questions.prompt: Show long-term trend of temperature at 200 m in the Southern Ocean over the past 20 years.

cards.title: Trend Summary
cards.text: Linear warming trend of +0.04 °C per decade at 200 m depth.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT YEAR(date) AS year, AVG(temperature) FROM profiles WHERE region = 'Southern Ocean' AND depth = 200 GROUP BY YEAR(date);

demo_questions.prompt: Map areas where pH < 7.9 coincides with high chlorophyll in the Pacific Ocean (2024).

cards.title: Low pH + High Chlorophyll Zones — Pacific 2024
Co-Occurrence Summary
cards.text: Detected 12 floats with pH < 7.9 and chl-a > 2 mg/m³, mostly along upwelling zones.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT * FROM bgc_profiles WHERE region = 'Pacific Ocean' AND parameter IN ('pH','chlorophyll') AND date BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-12-31' GROUP BY float_id HAVING MIN(pH)<7.9 AND MAX(chlorophyll)>2;

demo_questions.prompt: Show speed and drift rates of Mediterranean floats deployed in 2022.
demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT float_id, AVG(drift_speed) FROM trajectories WHERE region = 'Mediterranean Sea' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM deployment_date) = 2022 GROUP BY float_id;

demo_questions.prompt: Compare nitrate concentration in North Atlantic spring 2024 with oxygen concentration at the same locations.

cards.title: Correlation Summary
cards.text: Inverse relationship observed: high nitrate coincides with oxygen minima at 200–400 m depth.

demo_questions.querieGenerated: SELECT nitrate, oxygen, depth FROM bgc_profiles WHERE region = 'North Atlantic' AND date BETWEEN '2024-03-01' AND '2024-05-31';
